ddls:
CREATE TABLE "site_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the monitoring_sites table */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute being tracked */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute at a specific point in time */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the attribute value was recorded */,
  "units" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the monitoring_sites table */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the reading was taken */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being measured */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter at the time of the reading */,
  "units" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "ct" TEXT /* Country abbreviation (e.g., US) */,
  "st" TEXT /* State abbreviation (e.g., AL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_regions" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the monitoring_sites table */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id", "region_id")
)
